<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th>Feature</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>🔌</td>
<td><strong>Auto-loading Plugins</strong></td>
<td>Drop a <code>.ts</code> file in <code>plugins/</code> — it loads automatically, zero registration</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>💬</td>
<td><strong>250+ Commands</strong></td>
<td>Group management, privacy, moderation, fun, AI, media, utilities</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>🗄️</td>
<td><strong>5 Storage Backends</strong></td>
<td>MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, or JSON files</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>🛡️</td>
<td><strong>Group Protection</strong></td>
<td>Anti-spam, bad word filter, link detection, anti-tag abuse</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>👑</td>
<td><strong>Role System</strong></td>
<td>Owner, Sudo, Admin, and User permission levels</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⏰</td>
<td><strong>Scheduled Messages</strong></td>
<td>Schedule messages with natural time input</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>🤖</td>
<td><strong>AI Chatbot</strong></td>
<td>Per-chat AI conversation mode</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>🔒</td>
<td><strong>Privacy Controls</strong></td>
<td>Full WhatsApp privacy management via commands</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>📊</td>
<td><strong>Polls & Voting</strong></td>
<td>Create polls with live vote tracking in groups</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>📡</td>
<td><strong>Broadcast</strong></td>
<td>Bulk message all groups or all DM contacts at once</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>🔁</td>
<td><strong>Auto-Reply</strong></td>
<td>Configurable trigger-based auto responses with <code>{name}</code> support</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>🎮</td>
<td><strong>Games</strong></td>
<td>TicTacToe and more built in</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⏳</td>
<td><strong>Disappearing Messages</strong></td>
<td>Set per-chat or default timers via commands</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>📱</td>
<td><strong>Multi-Platform</strong></td>
<td>Runs on Termux, VPS, Railway, Render, Heroku, Koyeb, Fly.io, Replit</td>
</tr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 1 — Open the session generator</h3><a id="user-content-step-1--open-the-session-generator" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 1 — Open the session generator" href="#step-1--open-the-session-generator"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto">🌐 <strong><a href="https://mega-pairing.onrender.com" rel="nofollow">https://mega-pairing.onrender.com</a></strong></p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 2 — Generate your session</h3><a id="user-content-step-2--generate-your-session" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 2 — Generate your session" href="#step-2--generate-your-session"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Option A — Pair Code</strong> <em>(Recommended)</em></p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Enter your bot's WhatsApp number with country code (e.g. <code>923001234567</code>)</li>
<li>Click <strong>Generate Pair Code</strong></li>
<li>An 8-character code appears (e.g. <code>J38K-4PNS</code>)</li>
<li>On your phone: <strong>WhatsApp → ⋮ Menu → Linked Devices → Link a Device → Link with phone number</strong></li>
<li>Enter the code — session is created</li>
<li>Copy the <strong>Session ID</strong> shown on the page</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Option B — QR Code</strong></p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Click the <strong>QR Code</strong> tab</li>
<li>Scan the QR code with your WhatsApp</li>
<li>Copy the <strong>Session ID</strong> shown after scanning</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 3 — Add to <code>.env</code></h3><a id="user-content-step-3--add-to-env" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 3 — Add to .env" href="#step-3--add-to-env"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Alternative — Pairing via terminal</h3><a id="user-content-alternative--pairing-via-terminal" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Alternative — Pairing via terminal" href="#alternative--pairing-via-terminal"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Leave <code>SESSION_ID</code> empty and set:</p>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-dotenv notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ── REQUIRED (choose one) ────────────────────────────────────</span>
<span class="pl-v">SESSION_ID</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">GlobalTechInfo/MEGA-MD_your_gist_id_here</span>
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> OR</span>
<span class="pl-v">PAIRING_NUMBER</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">923001234567</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ── REQUIRED ─────────────────────────────────────────────────</span>
<span class="pl-v">OWNER_NUMBER</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">923000000000</span>        <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> No + sign</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ── BOT IDENTITY ─────────────────────────────────────────────</span>
<span class="pl-v">BOT_NAME</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">MEGA-MD-PRO</span>
<span class="pl-v">BOT_OWNER</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">GlobalTechInfo</span>
<span class="pl-v">PACKNAME</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">MEGA-MD</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ── BEHAVIOUR ────────────────────────────────────────────────</span>
<span class="pl-v">PREFIXES</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">.,!,/</span>                   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Comma-separated</span>
<span class="pl-v">COMMAND_MODE</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">public</span>              <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> public or private</span>
<span class="pl-v">TIMEZONE</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">Asia/Karachi</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ── OPTIONAL API KEYS ────────────────────────────────────────</span>
<span class="pl-v">REMOVEBG_KEY</span><span class="pl-k">=</span>                    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> https://remove.bg/api</span>
<span class="pl-v">GIPHY_API_KEY</span><span class="pl-k">=</span>                   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> https://developers.giphy.com</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ── PERFORMANCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────</span>
<span class="pl-v">PORT</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">5000</span>
<span class="pl-v">MAX_STORE_MESSAGES</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">50</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> ── DATABASE (all empty = JSON files) ────────────────────────</span>
<span class="pl-v">MONGO_URL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span>
<span class="pl-v">POSTGRES_URL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span>
<span class="pl-v">MYSQL_URL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span>
<span class="pl-v">DB_URL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span>                          <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> SQLite: ./data/baileys.db</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# ── REQUIRED (choose one) ────────────────────────────────────
SESSION_ID=GlobalTechInfo/MEGA-MD_your_gist_id_here
# OR
PAIRING_NUMBER=923001234567

# ── REQUIRED ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
OWNER_NUMBER=923000000000        # No + sign

# ── BOT IDENTITY ─────────────────────────────────────────────
BOT_NAME=MEGA-MD-PRO
BOT_OWNER=GlobalTechInfo
PACKNAME=MEGA-MD

# ── BEHAVIOUR ────────────────────────────────────────────────
PREFIXES=.,!,/                   # Comma-separated
COMMAND_MODE=public              # public or private
TIMEZONE=Asia/Karachi

# ── OPTIONAL API KEYS ────────────────────────────────────────
REMOVEBG_KEY=                    # https://remove.bg/api
GIPHY_API_KEY=                   # https://developers.giphy.com

# ── PERFORMANCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────
PORT=5000
MAX_STORE_MESSAGES=50

# ── DATABASE (all empty = JSON files) ────────────────────────
MONGO_URL=
POSTGRES_URL=
MYSQL_URL=
DB_URL=                          # SQLite: ./data/baileys.db" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 1. Clone</span>
git clone https://github.com/GlobalTechInfo/MEGA-MD.git
<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> MEGA-MD

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 2. Install dependencies</span>
npm install

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 3. Configure</span>
cp sample.env .env
nano .env

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 4. Start</span>
npm start</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# 1. Clone
git clone https://github.com/GlobalTechInfo/MEGA-MD.git
cd MEGA-MD

# 2. Install dependencies
npm install

# 3. Configure
cp sample.env .env
nano .env

# 4. Start
npm start" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Manual:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>heroku login
heroku create your-bot-name
heroku stack:set container

heroku config:set OWNER_NUMBER=923001234567
heroku config:set MONGO_URL=your_mongodb_url   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Recommended</span>

git push heroku main
heroku ps:scale web=1
heroku logs --tail</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Plugin Template</h3><a id="user-content-plugin-template" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Plugin Template" href="#plugin-template"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">default</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">command</span>: <span class="pl-s">'mycommand'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">aliases</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-s">'mc'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s">'mycmd'</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">category</span>: <span class="pl-s">'utility'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">'Does something cool'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">usage</span>: <span class="pl-s">'.mycommand <input>'</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>

    <span class="pl-c">// Optional permission flags</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">ownerOnly</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>      <span class="pl-c">// Owner/sudo only</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">groupOnly</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>      <span class="pl-c">// Groups only</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">adminOnly</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>      <span class="pl-c">// Group admins only</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">isPrefixless</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>    <span class="pl-c">// Works without prefix too</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">cooldown</span>: <span class="pl-c1">5</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>           <span class="pl-c">// Cooldown in seconds</span>

    <span class="pl-c1">async</span> <span class="pl-c1">handler</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">sock</span>: <span class="pl-s1">any</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">message</span>: <span class="pl-s1">any</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">args</span>: <span class="pl-s1">any</span><span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-s1"></span><span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">context</span>: <span class="pl-s1">any</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            chatId<span class="pl-kos">,</span>           <span class="pl-c">// Chat JID</span>
            senderId<span class="pl-kos">,</span>         <span class="pl-c">// Sender JID</span>
            isGroup<span class="pl-kos">,</span>          <span class="pl-c">// boolean</span>
            isSenderAdmin<span class="pl-kos">,</span>    <span class="pl-c">// boolean</span>
            isBotAdmin<span class="pl-kos">,</span>       <span class="pl-c">// boolean</span>
            senderIsOwnerOrSudo<span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c">// boolean</span>
            rawText<span class="pl-kos">,</span>          <span class="pl-c">// Full message text</span>
            userMessage<span class="pl-kos">,</span>      <span class="pl-c">// Lowercase message</span>
            config<span class="pl-kos">,</span>           <span class="pl-c">// Bot configuration </span>
            channelInfo       <span class="pl-c">// MEGA-MD branding spread</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">context</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

        <span class="pl-k">await</span> <span class="pl-s1">sock</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">sendMessage</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">chatId</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            <span class="pl-c1">text</span>: <span class="pl-s">`You said: <span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">${</span><span class="pl-s1">args</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">join</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">' '</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span>`</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
            ...<span class="pl-s1">channelInfo</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">quoted</span>: <span class="pl-s1">message</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="export default {
    command: 'mycommand',
    aliases: ['mc', 'mycmd'],
    category: 'utility',
    description: 'Does something cool',
    usage: '.mycommand <input>',

    // Optional permission flags
    ownerOnly: false,      // Owner/sudo only
    groupOnly: false,      // Groups only
    adminOnly: false,      // Group admins only
    isPrefixless: true,    // Works without prefix too
    cooldown: 5,           // Cooldown in seconds

    async handler(sock: any, message: any, args: any[], context: any = {}) {
        const {
            chatId,           // Chat JID
            senderId,         // Sender JID
            isGroup,          // boolean
            isSenderAdmin,    // boolean
            isBotAdmin,       // boolean
            senderIsOwnerOrSudo, // boolean
            rawText,          // Full message text
            userMessage,      // Lowercase message
            config,           // Bot configuration 
            channelInfo       // MEGA-MD branding spread
        } = context;

        await sock.sendMessage(chatId, {
            text: `You said: ${args.join(' ')}`,
            ...channelInfo
        }, { quoted: message });
    }
};" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bot not connecting</h3><a id="user-content-bot-not-connecting" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bot not connecting" href="#bot-not-connecting"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-alert markdown-alert-important" dir="auto"><p class="markdown-alert-title" dir="auto"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-report mr-2" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M0 1.75C0 .784.784 0 1.75 0h12.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v9.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 13H8.06l-2.573 2.573A1.458 1.458 0 0 1 3 14.543V13H1.75A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 11.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v9.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h2a.75.75 0 0 1 .75.75v2.19l2.72-2.72a.749.749 0 0 1 .53-.22h6.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-9.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Zm7 2.25v2.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.5 0v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM9 9a1 1 0 1 1-2 0 1 1 0 0 1 2 0Z"></path></svg>Important</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Verify <code>SESSION_ID</code> starts with <code>GlobalTechInfo/MEGA-MD_</code></li>
<li>If using <code>PAIRING_NUMBER</code>, link within 60 seconds of the code appearing</li>
<li>Reset session and reconnect: <code>npm run reset-session && npm start</code></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>myAppStateKey not present</code> (pin/star broken)</h3><a id="user-content-myappstatekey-not-present-pinstar-broken" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: myAppStateKey not present (pin/star broken)" href="#myappstatekey-not-present-pinstar-broken"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Session lost its app state keys. Fix:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>node -e <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-s">const fs = require('fs');</span>
<span class="pl-s">const c = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('session/creds.json','utf8'));</span>
<span class="pl-s">delete c.myAppStateKeyId;</span>
<span class="pl-s">fs.writeFileSync('session/creds.json', JSON.stringify(c, null, 2));</span>
<span class="pl-s">console.log('Done');</span>
<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
npm start</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="node -e "
const fs = require('fs');
const c = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('session/creds.json','utf8'));
delete c.myAppStateKeyId;
fs.writeFileSync('session/creds.json', JSON.stringify(c, null, 2));
console.log('Done');
"
npm start" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

</svg>

<p dir="auto">Send any message to the bot — WhatsApp re-syncs keys automatically. They are now preserved across restarts.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Commands not responding</h3><a id="user-content-commands-not-responding" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Commands not responding" href="#commands-not-responding"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Check you're using the right prefix (default <code>.</code>)</li>
<li><code>COMMAND_MODE=private</code> → only owner can use commands</li>
<li><code>OWNER_NUMBER</code> must have no <code>+</code> sign</li>
</ul>

<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Test Suite</th>
<th>What's Covered</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Unit — <code>myfunc</code></td>
<td>21 utility function tests with real input/output assertions</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Unit — <code>commandHandler</code></td>
<td>Command registration, alias routing, toggle, suggestions</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Unit — <code>isOwner</code></td>
<td>JID matching, device suffix stripping, sudo checks</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Unit — <code>isBanned</code></td>
<td>File-based ban list read/write</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Unit — <code>paths</code></td>
<td>Data directory resolution</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Integration — plugins</td>
<td>ALL plugins load, no duplicate commands/aliases, correct field types</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Integration — <code>messageHandler</code></td>
<td>Full message flow, banned users, error handling</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Integration — group events</td>
<td>add/remove/promote/demote without crashing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Integration — call handling</td>
<td>Anticall reject, warn, empty call safety</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto">Uses <a href="https://vitest.dev" rel="nofollow">Vitest</a> with a custom Baileys socket mock that simulates real WhatsApp message flows without requiring a live connection.</p>
</blockquote>
